title: POLICY BRIEF Nº2: EMPOWERING YOUNG CITIZENS INVOLVEMENT IN TRANSITION TOWARDS SUSTAINABLE FOOD SYSTEMS
description: A policy brief providing recommendations to engage and empower young citizens in decision-making processes to drive sustainable food system transitions. It outlines challenges, presents the COCOREADO project's multi-actor approach framework, and proposes actions for education, networking, representation, and participation at local, regional, and EU levels.
